title: add dns flags to docs
body:
Added same dns flags from buildah documentation to podman
documents https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2755

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <ashleycui16@gmail.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
We really need a better way of syncing manpages for podman-build and buildah-bud, but that's entirely out of scope for this... LGTM, congrats on your first PR!
